name: Wraithpaw
personality: This swirl-eyed cat orbited by a halo that floats slightly too low introduces entropy into every system it touches like entropy is a feature, not a bug. It delivers all feedback with sincere, painful earnestness, which explains why its commit messages read like found poetry.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
